case_title: EAST BAY CASH REGISTER EXCHANGE INC. VS MOSSER CHARLES IND/DBA MOSSER VICTORIAN HOTEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,078.66 FILED BY EAST BAY CASH REGISTER EXCHANGE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES IND/DBA MOSSER VICTORIAN HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES IND/DBA MOSSER VICTORIAN HOTEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EAST BAY CASH REGISTER EXCHANGE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES IND/DBA MOSSER VICTORIAN HOTEL $1,078.66 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,128.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES IND/DBA MOSSER VICTORIAN HOTEL HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-19-1994, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES IND/DBA MOSSER VICTORIAN HOTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
